title: The Discovery
summary: Sin, a research scientist at an unnamed bio-research lab, synthesises the first successful batch of what she will later name the Apotheosis Serum. She administers it to herself, transforming into a 13ft giantess.

title: SinCorp Founded
summary: Working in the shadows, Sin manoeuvres herself into control of the bio-research lab and restructures it under her own name. SinCorp begins quietly mass-producing the Apotheosis Serum and planning its global release.

title: Early Toy Mods
summary: SinCorp creates the early prototype of what will one day become the toy durability mods and sells them to multiple govements as a means to fund Sin's plans for TDay.

title: Apotheosis TDay Variant Created
summary: Sin creates a new wide reaching variant of the original serum poised for her TDay plans.

title: TDay — Transformation Day
summary: Sin triggers the planned cataclysm. The Apotheosis Serum is released into the world simultaneously through water supplies, airborne dispersal, and SinCorp's global distribution network. Women across the world begin transforming — growing, changing, and losing their empathy. The old world collapses within weeks.

title: Rise of the Mega-Cities
summary: The first mega-cities begin to take shape as the Transformed consolidate power. Enormous infrastructure is constructed to accommodate giantess-scale inhabitants. Angora, under Sin's direct rule, emerges as the most powerful of these new city-states.

title: Sister Mega Cities Begin to Form
Project Sylph
summary: Sin's initiative to create a lieutenant class between giantesses and toys, using a serum keyed off femininity rather than womanhood. Marks the transition into a new era.
